_doc: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH (CLAUDE.md §2). Each model carries pricing AND its native input constraints. The Create composer renders its controls and validates references from `constraints`; the /api/generate route and falInput re-validate from the same fields, so the UI can never offer something the model rejects. Adding a frontier model = one entry here. Ref-media size/length defaults live in lib/pricing.ts (REF_MEDIA_DEFAULTS) and are overridable per-model via constraints.refMedia.

openai/gpt-image-2.label: GPT Image 2
openai/gpt-image-2.promptHint: Literal and layout-obedient — spell out positions, exact text in quotes, panel counts. The default image model and storyboard & reference-sheet workhorse.
openai/gpt-image-2.notes: Default image model. Reasoning image model — best text rendering, reference sheets, storyboard grids. Every image renders at quality=high ($0.16) — concept and final alike, no cheap-explore pass; 4K ($0.41) for print/hero finishing. low/medium ($0.01/$0.06) remain as manual overrides only.

openai/gpt-image-2/edit.label: GPT Image 2 Edit
openai/gpt-image-2/edit.promptHint: Describe the edit relative to the references: 'same character as @Image1, now mid-jump, stadium behind'. Up to 10 reference images.

fal-ai/nano-banana-2.label: Nano Banana 2
fal-ai/nano-banana-2.promptHint: Intent + constraints: 'exact text: …', identity lock, chart values. Strong typography and layout control.

fal-ai/nano-banana-pro.label: Nano Banana Pro
fal-ai/nano-banana-pro.promptHint: Intent + constraints — best-in-class text rendering and identity lock. 'exact text: …', brand palette named explicitly.

fal-ai/flux-pro/v1.1-ultra.label: FLUX1.1 Pro Ultra
fal-ai/flux-pro/v1.1-ultra.promptHint: FLUX reads natural, descriptive prose — lighting, lens, mood. Native 2K photorealism.
fal-ai/flux-pro/v1.1-ultra.notes: Black Forest Labs flagship — native 2K (4MP) photorealism at $0.06/image.

fal-ai/flux-pro/v1.1.label: FLUX1.1 Pro
fal-ai/flux-pro/v1.1.promptHint: FLUX reads natural, descriptive prose — lighting, lens, mood. Production photorealism.

fal-ai/flux/dev.label: FLUX.1 Dev
fal-ai/flux/dev.promptHint: Best price/quality FLUX. Descriptive prose, strong prompt adherence.

fal-ai/flux-1/schnell.label: FLUX.1 Schnell
fal-ai/flux-1/schnell.promptHint: Fastest FLUX for drafts and batch — keep prompts concise.
fal-ai/flux-1/schnell.notes: Fastest, cheapest draft model — $0.003 per megapixel.

fal-ai/qwen-image.label: Qwen-Image
fal-ai/qwen-image.promptHint: Qwen excels at complex text rendering and precise layout — spell exact text in quotes.
fal-ai/qwen-image.notes: Strong complex text rendering and layout, ~$0.02 per megapixel.

fal-ai/flux-pro/kontext.label: FLUX.1 Kontext Pro
fal-ai/flux-pro/kontext.promptHint: Describe the edit relative to the reference: 'same subject, now mid-jump, stadium behind'. One reference image, character consistency preserved.
fal-ai/flux-pro/kontext.notes: In-context editing with character consistency, $0.04/image. One reference image.

fal-ai/flux-pro/kontext/max.label: FLUX.1 Kontext Max
fal-ai/flux-pro/kontext/max.promptHint: Premium in-context editing with the best prompt adherence and typography. One reference image.
fal-ai/flux-pro/kontext/max.notes: Premium editing — improved prompt adherence and typography, $0.08/image.

fal-ai/qwen-image-2/edit.label: Qwen Image 2 Edit
fal-ai/qwen-image-2/edit.promptHint: Cite up to 3 references by order — 'image 1', 'image 2'. Strong for compositing and precise edits.
fal-ai/qwen-image-2/edit.notes: Unified gen+edit, $0.035/image. 1–3 reference images, cited as image 1/2/3. Output follows the references — no aspect-ratio control.

fal-ai/kling-video/v3/pro/text-to-video.label: Kling 3.0 Pro
fal-ai/kling-video/v3/pro/text-to-video.promptHint: Kling's native shape: one filmic sentence, ONE camera move, name the light. Negative prompt kills artifacts.

fal-ai/kling-video/v3/pro/image-to-video.label: Kling 3.0 Pro (image)
fal-ai/kling-video/v3/pro/image-to-video.promptHint: Start frame locked from your reference — describe the JOURNEY: what moves, where the camera goes, how it ends.

bytedance/seedance-2.0/text-to-video.label: Seedance 2.0
bytedance/seedance-2.0/text-to-video.promptHint: Seedance dialect: shot-by-shot choreography. 'Shot 1: … Shot 2: …' — multi-clause action, native sfx described in-line.

bytedance/seedance-2.0/image-to-video.label: Seedance 2.0 (image)
bytedance/seedance-2.0/image-to-video.promptHint: Your image is the first frame — choreograph what happens next, shot by shot, sfx in-line.

bytedance/seedance-2.0/reference-to-vide.label: Seedance 2.0 (refs)
bytedance/seedance-2.0/reference-to-vide.promptHint: The consistency hero. Cite refs by handle: '@Image1 sprints, camera tracking; cut to @Image2 …'. Up to 9 images + 3 videos + 3 audio steer identity, motion and sound. 1080p output.
bytedance/seedance-2.0/reference-to-vide.notes: Up to 9 images + 3 videos + 3 audio; @Image1/@Video1 syntax in prompt. The consistency-stack hero renderer.

fal-ai/veo3.1/fast.label: Veo 3.1 Fast
fal-ai/veo3.1/fast.promptHint: Veo reads dialogue and narration natively — put spoken lines in quotes. Strong prompt adherence, 720p.

fal-ai/kling-video/v2.5-turbo/pro/text-t.label: Kling 2.5 Turbo Pro
fal-ai/kling-video/v2.5-turbo/pro/text-t.promptHint: One filmic sentence, ONE camera move, name the light. Negative prompt kills artifacts.

fal-ai/kling-video/v2.5-turbo/pro/image-.label: Kling 2.5 Turbo Pro (image)
fal-ai/kling-video/v2.5-turbo/pro/image-.promptHint: Start frame locked from your reference — describe the journey: what moves, where the camera goes.

fal-ai/minimax/hailuo-02/pro/text-to-vid.label: Hailuo 02 Pro
fal-ai/minimax/hailuo-02/pro/text-to-vid.promptHint: Hailuo handles dynamic motion and physics well — describe action and camera plainly. 1080p.

fal-ai/minimax/hailuo-02/pro/image-to-vi.label: Hailuo 02 Pro (image)
fal-ai/minimax/hailuo-02/pro/image-to-vi.promptHint: Your image is the first frame — describe what happens next. 1080p.

fal-ai/topaz/upscale/video.label: Topaz Video Upscale
fal-ai/topaz/upscale/video.notes: $0.08/s for 4K output ($0.02/s up to 1080p, double for 60fps). upscale_factor 1-4, target_fps 16-60 frame interpolation.

fal-ai/topaz/upscale/image.label: Topaz Image Upscale
fal-ai/topaz/upscale/image.notes: $0.08 up to 24MP output — print/4K-grade image finishing.

fal-ai/recraft/upscale/crisp.label: Recraft Crisp Upscale
fal-ai/recraft/upscale/crisp.notes: Cheap detail-preserving upscale for drafts and social images.

scoring.notes: Vision LLM that auto-rates a finished render's fidelity to its prompt (0-10 + a one-line critique). Not a generation model — kept out of the composer router. Off by default; ~$0.002/render when enabled.
